title: Devpilot production-grade MVP final closure
objective: Move Devpilot from Docker-backed production-like staging passed to production-grade MVP deliverability or a real external blocker.
completion_standard: Code and documents are reconciled, verified, and committed.
Any local Docker, staging, or fake-target checks that can be run without real cloud or production credentials are automated or verified.
Real cloud, production credentials, and human approvals are not claimed unless the approved evidence exists.

final_judgment.reason: All local and Docker-backed checks available in this checkout are complete; real provider/resource provisioning, production backup/rollback rehearsal, and live restore approval require external credentials, targets, and approvals.
not_production_mvp_ready_until: approved real provider credentials and staging or production target ids are provided and provisioning evidence is captured
production backup and rollback rehearsal is approved and evidence is captured
live restore has release-owner and data-owner approval, isolated target, validation query, rollback plan, and dryRun:false authorization

worker_policy: One active writer in this checkout.
Do not claim real provider or production validation without external evidence.
